x-enumeration-literals.name: Deposit Product Entry
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records savings and deposit-related products

Comment:
Example:
Savings Account, Fixed Deposit

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Product Entry
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records lending and credit products

Comment:
Example:
Mortgage Loan, Personal Loan,

x-enumeration-literals.name: Investment Product Entry
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records wealth and investment offerings

Comment:
Example:
Mutual Fund, Bonds

x-enumeration-literals.name: Card Product Entry
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Represents payment cards issued to customers for transactions and cash access

Comment:
Example:
Credit Card, Debit Card

x-enumeration-literals.name: Insurance Product Entry
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Represents protection-based financial products covering risks (e.g., life insurance).

Comment:
Example:
Life Insurance

x-enumeration-literals.name: Treasury Product Entry
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Represents financial products linked to liquidity or funding structures

Comment:
Example: Fixed Deposit, FX Product
